subject: Fermi GBM trigger 200429866/609886052 is not a GRB
body:
R. Hamburg (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor
Team:

���The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 200429866 / 609886052
at 20:47:27.98 UT on 29 April 2020, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in
fact
not due to a GRB. This trigger is due to continued flaring from
SGR 1935+2154 (GCN 27659)."
